data.title: Ripple’s Brad Garlinghouse addresses Treasury’s Bessent and calls for clear crypto and stablecoin regulation
data.description:
Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse urges U. S. lawmakers to pass clear crypto and stablecoin regulations after the Senate fails to advance the GENIUS Act.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ripples-brad-garlinghouse-addresses-bessent/

data.title: Web3 tourism ecosystem platform Coinsidings launches the fourth round of CSS IPOs
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 tourism ecological platform Coinsidings announced that it will start the fourth round of CSS option tokens at 14:00 on May 9 to lock in the AIA chain 40,000 token participation threshold.
It is reported that CSS, as a core equity certificate, can not only participate in the main network token casting and tourism consumption exchange, but also have future dividends and governance rights. The release ratio of this round is still 10% immediate release + 90% linear unlocking for ten months.
Coinsidings officials said that CSS will bind more RWA projects in the future, and gradually open application scenarios such as DeFi staking, DAO voting, and ecological dividends.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences $253 Million Liquidation in Four Hours
data.description: According to PANews, recent data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market witnessed a significant liquidation event, totaling $253 million over the past four hours. Long positions accounted for $49.78 million of the liquidations, while short positions saw a much larger impact with $203 million liquidated. Bitcoin (BTC) experienced liquidations amounting to $35.65 million, whereas Ethereum (ETH) faced a substantially higher liquidation volume of $117 million, approximately 3.28 times that of Bitcoin.

data.title: Betrayal Over XRP Push Prompts Trump to Sideline Ripple Allies
data.description:
A Politico report alleges Donald Trump was misled by a lobbyist tied to Ripple Labs into endorsing XRP for a U. S. crypto reserve.

The post Betrayal Over XRP Push Prompts Trump to Sideline Ripple Allies first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/05/09/trump-tricked-to-include-xrp-us-reserve/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=trump-tricked-to-include-xrp-us-reserve

data.title: LBank Market: MOODENG, MOONKIN, and CHILLHOUSE hit new highs, with 24-hour increases of 177%, 158%, and 132% respectively
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News LBank market shows: LBank's online token MOODENG rose above 0.12USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.124USDT, and is now quoted at 0.124USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 177%, and a current market value of approximately US$120 million.
LBank's online token MOONKIN rose above 0.000018USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.000018USDT, and is now quoted at 0.000016USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 158%, and a current market value of approximately US$6.73 million.
LBank's online token CHILLHOUSE rose above 0.005USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.00506USDT, and is now quoted at 0.0041USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 132%, and a current market value of approximately US$4.13 million.

data.title: BNB Chain and Binance Alpha Show Strong Synergy: 40% Are BSC Native Projects, Weekly Trading Volume Doubles
data.description: According to data from Dune and BscScan, Binance Alpha projects within the BNB Chain ecosystem are showing outstanding performance: among 121 Alpha projects, over 70% are BSC tokens, with 38% being BSC native projects covering hot sectors like AI, Meme, and DeFi. BSC token trading volume accounts for about 40% of total Alpha trading volume; weekly trading volume surged by 122.5%, and weekly trading value rose by 78% week-on-week.Among the top 20 Alpha tokens by trading volume, half are BSC native projects. Of the top 10 Alpha tokens ranked by new active users, 90% are BSC tokens, with six projects having over 20% new user share. On-chain BSC data has also surged: around 4.3 million new users were added in the past week, with daily new addresses surpassing one million for two consecutive days, and active addresses exceeding two million. The total number of unique BSC addresses has reached 552 million.So far, 12 BSC project tokens have been listed on Binance spot trading through Alpha. In addition, ongoing BSC Alpha trading competitions offer rewards, double trading volume incentives, and Binance airdrops for holding certain BSC Meme tokens.

data.title: Unichain First Ethereum L2 to Deploy Flashbots Rollup-Boost TEE
data.description:
Catenaa, Friday, May 09, 2025- Unichain, an Ethereum Layer 2 network developed by Uniswap Labs, has become the first to process transactions using Flashbots’ Rollup-Boost trusted execution environment, a move aimed at scaling throughput and curbing maximal extractable value (MEV) on-chain. The tool, co-developed by Uniswap Labs and MEV-focused research group Flashbots, enables transaction sequencing […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/unichain-first-ethereum-l2-to-deploy-flashbots-rollup-boost-tee

data.title: Is Pi Network dead? What really went wrong behind the hype
data.description:
What Pi Network promised When Pi Network first hit the scene in 2019, it had a simple but compelling pitch: What if you could mine cryptocurrency straight from your phone — no expensive gear, no massive electricity bills, just a tap a day on an app?It caught fire. Millions of people jumped on board, lured by the idea of “free” mobile mining and a chance to get in early on the next big thing. The app made it easy: You signed up, invited a few friends, tapped a button every 24 hours, and watched your Pi (PI) balance slowly grow. With the social referral model fueling growth, it wasn’t long before over 70 million users had signed up worldwide
source: https://cointelegraph.com/explained/is-pi-network-dead-what-really-went-wrong-behind-the-hype?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: SEC, Ripple Ink $50M Settlement to End Long-Running Legal Battle
data.description:

data.title: BNB Chain and Binance Alpha synergy effect exploded: 40% of BSC native projects, weekly trading volume doubled
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to data from Dune and BscScan on May 9, Binance Alpha projects in the BNB Chain ecosystem performed outstandingly: more than 70% of the 121 Alpha projects are BSC tokens, of which 38% are BSC native projects, covering popular tracks such as AI, Meme, and DeFi. BSC token trading volume accounts for about 40% of the total Alpha trading volume; weekly trading volume soared 122.5%, and weekly trading volume increased by 78% month-on-month, with strong ecological growth potential. 
Half of the top 20 traded Alpha tokens are BSC native projects. Among the top 10 Alpha tokens with new active users, 90% are BSC tokens, of which 6 projects have new users accounting for more than 20%; BSC chain data also soared simultaneously: about 4.3 million new users in the past week, the number of new addresses per day exceeded one million for two consecutive days, the number of active addresses exceeded 2 million, and the total number of BSC independent addresses reached 552 million.
At present, 12 BSC project tokens have been listed on Binance spot trading through Alpha, forming an ecological positive cycle. In addition, the ongoing BSC Alpha trading competition divides rewards, doubles the transaction volume, and holds some BSC Memes to obtain Binance airdrops.
Thanks to low gas fees, high performance and a large user base, BNB Chain is forming a deep synergy with Binance Wallet and Alpha, becoming a core platform for project incubation, user growth and wealth effect.
